name: remote_mcp_hosting_provider_tools_list_latency_publisher
friction: The latency benchmark pipeline produces raw measurement files and aggregated JSON — but no human-readable output, no machine-discoverable index, and no static site for Google or LLM crawlers.
input: Directory of tools_list_*.json files produced by the remote MCP server hosting provider latency benchmark pipeline (latency_measurement_results_collector, data branch).
output: Static site in out/: llms.txt, llms-full.txt, llms.json (90-day stats), llms-full.json (24h stats + runs), robots.txt, index.html (mobile-first summary), one HTML page per hosting provider, one HTML page per pinger origin, one JSON file per pinger origin.
output_url: GitHub Pages URL — to be configured when the repo is published.
when_to_use: After new measurement files have been collected and you want to update the public benchmark site and machine-readable data files.
when_not_to_use: To run measurements (use tools_list_latency_measurer). To collect and consolidate results (use latency_measurement_results_collector). To produce agent-native JSON only (use remote_mcp_hosting_provider_tools_list_latency_analysis).
schedule: On demand or triggered after each collection run.
